headline: 12 contracts catalogued across Ethereum and Base; 6 core bridge and admin contracts on Ethereum, 5 Base-Solana bridge contracts on Base, plus admin multisigs
short_headline: 12 contracts discovered on Ethereum and Base

findings.text: Etherscan name-tag search for 'Base Bridge' surfaced L1StandardBridge (0x3154Cf16ccdb4C6d922629664174b904d80F2C35) on Ethereum with $971M+ TVL across 7 chains as of Apr-22-2026

Official deployments doc at https://docs.base.org/base-chain/network-information/base-contracts lists L1 contract addresses including L1StandardBridge, L1CrossDomainMessenger, L1ERC721Bridge, ProxyAdmin, and AddressManager for Ethereum mainnet

Base Bridge documentation at https://docs.base.org/base-chain/quickstart/base-solana-bridge lists 5 core Base-Solana bridge contracts: Bridge (0x3eff766C76a1be2Ce1aCF2B69c78bCae257D5188), BridgeValidator (0xAF24c1c24Ff3BF1e6D882518120fC25442d6794B), CrossChainERC20Factory (0xDD56781d0509650f8C2981231B6C917f2d5d7dF2), SOL token (0x311935Cd80B76769bF2ecC9D8Ab7635b2139cf82), and Relayer Orchestrator (0x8Cfa6F29930E6310B6074baB0052c14a709B4741) on Base mainnet

Official admin addresses doc lists 6 admin roles for Ethereum: Batch Sender (0x5050f69a9786f081509234f1a7f4684b5e5b76c9, EOA), Output Proposer (0x642229f238fb9de03374be34b0ed8d9de80752c5, EOA), Proxy Admin Owner (0x7bB41C3008B3f03FE483B28b8DB90e19Cf07595c, Gnosis Safe), Challenger (0x8Ca1E12404d16373Aef756179B185F27b2994F3a, EOA), SystemConfig owner (0x14536667Cd30e52C0b458BaACcB9faDA7046E056, Gnosis Safe), and Guardian (0x09f7150D8c019BeF34450d6920f6B3608ceFdAf2, Gnosis Safe)

No audit links recorded in protocol metadata, and Base Bridge GitHub repository (https://github.com/base/bridge) does not list audit reports in accessible directories; 'audits' folder exists but content not fetched

GitHub repository https://github.com/base/bridge confirms Base Bridge is source-code repository with base/ and solana/ subdirectories for cross-chain bridge implementation; no deployment artifacts (Foundry broadcast or hardhat-deploy files) discovered in fetched navigation
Protocol.chains lists only Ethereum; Base-Solana bridge contracts are deployed on Base (L2) and Solana, not Ethereum; discovery focused on Ethereum per specification

rationale.verdict: Discovery catalogues 12 distinct contract addresses across the Base Bridge ecosystem: 6 core Ethereum L1 bridge contracts (L1StandardBridge, L1CrossDomainMessenger, L1ERC721Bridge, ProxyAdmin, AddressManager, OptimismMintableERC20Factory), and 6 admin roles on Ethereum (Batch Sender, Output Proposer, Proxy Admin Owner multisig, Challenger, SystemConfig owner multisig, Guardian multisig); plus 5 Base-Solana bridge contracts on Base (Bridge, BridgeValidator, CrossChainERC20Factory, SOL token, Relayer Orchestrator). All addresses sourced from official Base documentation and GitHub.

evidence.shows: Official Base Bridge documentation page listing bridge options including deprecated bridge.base.org and third-party bridges (Superbridge, Brid.gg), plus Base-Solana bridge contract addresses
Base Bridge ETH contract on Ethereum (L1StandardBridge) holding $971.8M+ TVL across 7 chains, 406,064 ETH as of Apr-22-2026, with 402,308 transactions

Official Base contracts list for Ethereum mainnet, including L1StandardBridge (0x3154Cf16ccdb4C6d922629664174b904d80F2C35), L1CrossDomainMessenger (0x866E82a600A1414e583f7F13623F1aC5d58b0Afa), L1ERC721Bridge (0x608d94945A64503E642E6370Ec598e519a2C1E53), ProxyAdmin (0x0475cBCAebd9CE8AfA5025828d5b98DFb67E059E), AddressManager (0x8EfB6B5c4767B09Dc9AA6Af4eAA89F749522BaE2), and 6 admin addresses including Batch Sender (0x5050f69a9786f081509234f1a7f4684b5e5b76c9), Output Proposer (0x642229f238fb9de03374be34b0ed8d9de80752c5), Proxy Admin Owner (0x7bB41C3008B3f03FE483B28b8DB90e19Cf07595c), Challenger (0x8Ca1E12404d16373Aef756179B185F27b2994F3a), SystemConfig owner (0x14536667Cd30e52C0b458BaACcB9faDA7046E056), and Guardian (0x09f7150D8c019BeF34450d6920f6B3608ceFdAf2)

Base-Solana bridge documentation listing mainnet contract addresses: Bridge (0x3eff766C76a1be2Ce1aCF2B69c78bCae257D5188), BridgeValidator (0xAF24c1c24Ff3BF1e6D882518120fC25442d6794B), CrossChainERC20Factory (0xDD56781d0509650f8C2981231B6C917f2d5d7dF2), SOL token (0x311935Cd80B76769bF2ecC9D8Ab7635b2139cf82), and Relayer Orchestrator (0x8Cfa6F29930E6310B6074baB0052c14a709B4741)

Official Base Bridge GitHub repository with base/ and solana/ subdirectories for Ethereum↔Base↔Solana cross-chain bridge implementation; MIT licensed; no deployment artifact files visible in repository structure

unknowns: D3: Audit links not recorded in protocol context; base/bridge GitHub audits/ folder exists but content not accessible via web fetch

D4: GitHub deployment artifacts (Foundry broadcast or hardhat-deploy files) not discovered; bridge repository structure suggests contracts in base/ and solana/ subdirectories but specific contract JSON artifacts not confirmed

protocol_metadata.about: Base Bridge enables asset transfers across Ethereum, Base, and Solana networks. The Ethereum↔Base bridge uses standard optimistic rollup bridging to transfer ETH and ERC-20 tokens, while the Base-Solana bridge enables bidirectional token transfers and arbitrary cross-chain messaging secured by Chainlink CCIP and Coinbase validators. The bridges serve as canonical bridges for canonical asset representation across chains.
